description: Style NoteA brand known for its unpredictable and unique styling baggit continues to awe us with their attractive designs for purses. Available to you in a variety of designs at prices that do not burn a hole in your pocket, these bags are a must buy. So go ahead. Indulge.Product DetailsBlack bag with two zippered pockets in frontPatch pocket in front with olive knit textured flap One main U shaped zippered compartment Lining with two zippered pocketsZippered compartment with branding at the backTwo olive green handles for carrying easeMaterials and CareSyntheticWipe with damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 42 cmWidth: 51 cm
